attributes.action: Ban all alcohol and recreational drugs from Parliament Random testing introduced
attributes.background:
Parliament is the most important place of work in the UK  There should be zero tolerance for alcohol and drugs as even a tiny amount can affect the decision making process.
All members and staff should submit to random testing.
There is no reason why this should not be the minimum requirement.

rejection.details: Mandate alcohol breathalyser and drug swab tests in House of Commons: https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/768899
